message:
Running command: MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

echo "=== Wrapper line count ==="
wc -l "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v"

echo ""
echo "=== Lines 2360-2400 (context around the problem) ==="
awk 'NR>=2360 && NR<=2400' "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v"

echo ""
echo "=== compute_ss port list verification ==="
grep -n "input wire\|output wire" "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.v" | head -30
